_comment: CANONICAL SSOT for the POST /cp/admin/promote request wire shape.
this file lives NEXT TO that struct and promote_request_contract_test.go asserts the struct's
json tags equal these keys EXACTLY (set-equality). The CP struct is the gated SSOT for the wire shape.
THE CLI (molecule-admin-cli/contract.json) AND MCP (molecule-mcp-admin/contract.json) COPIES MUST
carry these same 6 fields and their own _comment MUST name THIS file
change to the CP struct fails this CP test FIRST, before any wrapper drifts silently.
Mirrors the provision_request.contract.json pattern (provision_request_contract_test.go) which guards
the core -> CP provision request the same way.

components.note: component names, or empty / ["all"] for the full ordered set

target_tag.note: staging-<sha> to promote forward; empty resolves per-component from the staging-green marker

dry_run.note: true => return the ordered plan, ZERO side effects

confirm.note: required for a real full-platform promote (foot-gun guard)

rollback_to.note: optional: re-pin a prior tag/sha instead of promoting forward; when set it is the effective tag
